login_title: Log in with your Instagram account
guest_login_title: Log in or sign up for Threads
guest_login_desc: See what people are talking about and join the conversation.
guest_dialog_desc: Join Threads to share thoughts, find out what's going on, follow your people and more.
register_success_msg: We have sent a verification link to your email. Please check your email to verify your account.
register_failed_default: Registration failed. Please check your information!
username_invalid_format: The username field must only contain letters, numbers, dashes, and underscores.
register_success_desc: We have sent a confirmation link to <highlight>{{email}}</highlight>. Please check your inbox.
forgot_password_desc: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to get back into your account.
link_sent_success: Password reset link has been sent to your email.
link_sent_failed: Failed to send link. Please check your email!
email_invalid_server: The selected email is invalid or does not exist.
forgot_password_success_desc: We have sent a password reset link to <highlight>{{email}}</highlight>. Please check your inbox.
session_expired_login_again: Session expired. Please log in again!
check_email_warning: Please check your email and reset your password before logging in.
